titles.text: 宇宙豪商伝 爆裂商人

descriptions.text: Bakuretsu Akindo Uchuu Goushouden is a sugoroku board game (Japanese backgammon) that takes its players to the universe. Gameplay offers a high degree of freedom. Player can choose to make money slowly by taking up ordinary jobs, or take a risk and make a fortune at one stroke.
